title: Vietnamese Almond Crusted Piquant Delight
description: A fusion of flavors with a crunchy almond crust on a piquant delight, inspired by Vietnamese cuisine.
instructions: Rinse the piquant and dry with paper towels.
In a food processor, grind the almonds into a fine crumb.
In a shallow dish, mix the ground almonds and Vietnamese mi.
Dip each piquant piece into the almond mixture, coating evenly.
Place the coated piquant on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the almond crust is golden brown.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
